title: Caliber Lib
description: Caliber Lib is a library mod containing various aspects of all of my mods.  It is available for other developers to use for integration with CaliberMC mods or for use on their own projects as well!
body: Caliber Lib is a library mod containing various aspects of all of my mods.  It is available for other developers to use for integration with CaliberMC mods or for use on their own projects as well!
